narrative:
Westlake City has 25,226 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.8% D−R vs -2.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
